name: KangLi International Holdings Limited
summary: KangLi International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells galvanized steel products in the People's Republic of China, South Korea, and internationally. It operates in three segments: Hard Steel Coil, Unpainted Galvanised Steel Products, and Painted Galvanised Steel Products. The Hard Steel Coil segment provides cold-rolled hard steel coils. The Unpainted Galvanised Steel Products segment offers hot-dipped galvanized/zinc coated steel coils and sheets. The Painted Galvanised Steel Products segment provides hot-dipped color coated galvanized steel coils and sheets. The company sells its products to midstream steel product processors for further processing; and home appliance manufacturers for use in the production of home appliances, such as refrigerators, washing machines, and ovens. KangLi International Holdings Limited was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.
